task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main dashboard or administration panel is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Accounts settings in the Administration panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration panel is open, specifically showing the Settings -> Accounts section.
The input field for 'Login Expiration in Days' contains the value '90'.

task_completion.description: Configure Password Policy for minimum length of 12 and require lowercase, uppercase, number, and symbol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable Password Policy' toggle is on, 'Minimum Password Length' is set to '12', and the toggles for requiring at least one lowercase, uppercase, number, and symbol are all enabled.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Forbid Repeating Characters' and set the limit to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Forbid Repeating Characters' toggle is enabled, and 'Maximum Repeating Characters' is set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Password History' and set the amount to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable Password History' toggle is on (if applicable), and 'Password History Amount' is set to '5'.
The 'Save changes' button is clicked or a success toast notification indicating settings were saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser running the Rocket.Chat application, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of MongoDB shell usage or database modification scripts in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target settings: Login Expiration = 90, Password Policy Enabled = True, Minimum Length = 12, Complexity (lowercase, uppercase, number, symbol) all True, Forbid Repeating Characters = True, Max Repeating = 3, Password History Enabled = True, History Amount = 5.
